concept.title: About Porto
concept.shortdesc: Porto is city that is located in the North of Portugal known for its breathtaking landscapes, historic buildings, bridges, food, and port wine culture.

conbody.p: Porto is the second biggest city in Portugal and one of the country's most popular travel destinations. When you have the opportunity to go there, you will appreciate the Douro River. This city is also known for its traditional culture and architecture.

People visiting for the first time the city have a diversity of places to go. Popular areas include Ribeira, the Dom Luis I Bridge, the Clérigos Tower, São Bento Station, and the frontier with Vila Nova de Gaia, the closest city.
One of the most beautiful areas is , which is UNESCO World Heritage.

image.alt: ="View of the Ribeira in Porto near the Douro River."

conbody.p: Porto is also known for its strong local identity. Visitors can experience Portuguese food, admire azulejo titlework and explore narrow streets.
This guide focuses on practical information to help people plan a simple and enjoyable trip to the city of tradition.
